preview_text:
The model gives Croatia a strong favorite status at 81% win probability, leaving Ghana only a 2% chance of victory. The differential reflects a substantial gap in the statistical forecast between the two sides on this neutral ground.

The spread across outcomes shows Croatia commanding the match shape. A draw at 17% remains plausible but is considerably less likely than a Croatian win. Ghana's underdog position is severe; the model sees this as a highly asymmetric contest rather than a competitive encounter.

No sportsbook consensus is available yet, so no comparison between model and market can be made at this stage.
